name: Snaketris: Rescue 'em all
short_description: Oh no! Someone is capturing all the birds around the world. It's time for you to rescue them! Snaketris is a puzzle mechanics mashup where your main goal is to liberate all the trapped birds. Unlock cages, collect keys, use bombs and items in your way to become an animal hero!
detailed_description:
Oh no! Someone is capturing all the birds around the world. It's time for you to rescue them!

Snaketris is a puzzle mechanics mashup where your main goal is to liberate all the trapped birds. Navigate through deserts, forests, snow or beaches in over 25 beautifully designed levels, unlocking cages, collecting keys, using bombs and items in your way to become the ultimate animal hero!

Visit our website now to play a demo! ➡️➡️➡️➡️➡️➡️➡️

- A puzzle game with platform elements - The best from both worlds

- Over 25 beautifully manually-crafted levels in 4 different environments (Desert, Forest, Beach and Snow)

- Innovative mechanics on every level

- Simple and intuitive controls

- Logic solving challenges at every level
